shadowSentences: Can you help me with this?
Learning a new language is fun.
I like spending time with my family.
Volunteering can make a big difference in the community.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about your music preferences.
questions: Q1: What type of music do you enjoy listening to?
Q2: Have you ever faced any challenges in finding new music?
Q3: How do you think music affects our emotions?
Q4: What advice would you give someone looking to explore new genres?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about your travel experiences.
questions: Q1: Can you share a memorable trip you have taken?
Q2: What challenges did you face while traveling?
Q3: Why do you think travel is important for personal growth?
Q4: What tips do you have for someone planning their first trip?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about your hobbies and interests.
questions: Q1: What hobbies do you enjoy in your free time?
Q2: Have there been any challenges in pursuing your hobbies?
Q3: How do you believe hobbies contribute to a balanced life?
Q4: What would you suggest to someone who wants to find a new hobby?
